flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Columbia College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $9.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Columbia College fell 19% between 2007 and 2010 (23.9% → 19.2%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Columbia College fell 16% between 2009 and 2010 (7.7% → 6.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Columbia College rose 168% between 2007 and 2010 (1.2k → 3.1k).
